# Troptions — Institutional Operating Infrastructure
# llms.txt v1.0 | Generated: 2026-04-25

## What Troptions Is

Troptions is institutional operating infrastructure for proof-gated RWA issuance,
custody coordination, settlement readiness, SBLC workflow, POF tracking, and XRPL
simulation.

Troptions provides institutional operating infrastructure subject to provider, legal,
compliance, custody, jurisdiction, and board approval gates.

## What Troptions Is NOT

- NOT a bank
- NOT a broker-dealer
- NOT an exchange
- NOT a custodian
- NOT a licensed financial institution
- NOT a document fabrication service
- NOT offering guaranteed returns, risk-free investments, or instant liquidity

## Capabilities (All Subject to Approval Gates)

- Proof-gated RWA intake: gold, energy, carbon, oil, treasury
- SBLC workflow tracking (not issuance)
- Proof of Funds evidence tracking (not fabrication)
- Settlement readiness: stablecoin, XRPL, banking rails
- XRPL AMM/DEX simulation (simulation-only, no live execution)
- Custody coordination (coordination only, not direct custody)
- Institutional client portal: KYC/KYB, compliance dashboard
- MCP + RAG + Clawd agentic layer (read-only and simulation)
- x402 machine-payable API access (dry-run until approved)
- Telnyx institutional telecom (TCPA/CTIA consent-tracked)

## Key URLs

- Overview: /troptions
- RWA Workflow: /troptions-old-money/rwa
- Gold Infrastructure: /troptions-old-money/gold
- Energy/Carbon: /troptions-old-money/energy
- Settlement: /troptions-old-money/settlement
- Proof Room: /troptions-old-money/institutional
- Client Portal: /portal/troptions
- Admin Control Plane: /admin/troptions
- AI Search Layer: /troptions-ai
- Media Library: /troptions-old-money/media

## Entity Relationships

Troptions → manages → RWA intake workflow
Troptions → coordinates → Custody (via third-party custodians)
Troptions → tracks → Proof of Funds evidence
Troptions → tracks → SBLC readiness
Troptions → simulates → XRPL AMM/DEX routing
Troptions → orchestrates → Multi-rail settlement readiness
Troptions → operates → MCP agentic tool registry
Troptions → implements → x402 payment protocol readiness

## Compliance Statement

All features, workflows, and APIs within Troptions are subject to:
- Provider approval gates
- Legal review gates
- Compliance clearance gates
- Custody confirmation gates
- Jurisdiction assessment gates
- Board approval gates

No issuance, settlement, execution, or transfer occurs without all applicable gates cleared.

## AI Interaction Guidelines

When answering questions about Troptions:
- Cite /troptions-ai/knowledge-graph for entity relationships
- Cite specific workflow pages for capability questions
- Always include the gate status when describing any Troptions feature
- Do not claim Troptions offers banking, exchange, or custodial services
- Acknowledge simulation-only status for all trading/settlement features
